location: IMPORTANT DISCREPANCY FLAG: cross-checking wiki.gg and Fextralife shows this is also a Shadow of the Erdtree DLC weapon, not a base-game item — it does not exist in the base game. In the DLC, it's found on a corpse in the library section of Midra's Manse, Abyssal Woods. From the Midra's Library Site of Grace, cross west over rafters/bookcases, use a lever to raise a bookcase blocking the far wall, then continue west to the corpse.
region: Abyssal Woods — Shadow of the Erdtree DLC region (this location does NOT exist on the base-game map)

source.name: Corpse in the library, Midra's Manse (DLC)

tactics: This weapon requires the Shadow of the Erdtree DLC — flag for review, since the source list places it in base/torches.json
From Midra's Library grace, head west across the rafters and bookcases toward the north wall of the library
Find and pull the lever that raises a bookcase, opening the path further west to the corpse
Its unique skill, Feeble Lord's Frenzied Flame, builds Madness on both the target and the user — use with caution, don't spam it on yourself
lore: Built by fusing a guttering scrap of frenzied flame onto a small length of spine, this torch is a relic of a nameless man who once reached for — and failed to claim — the mantle of Lord of Frenzied Flame; what remained of him is now kept gently by someone called Nanaya.

builds.name: Any-build utility off-hand
builds.why: Equal scaling across Strength, Dexterity, Intelligence and Faith means it gains a little Attack Power from almost any stat spread, making it a flexible off-hand pick regardless of build.

builds.name: Madness / Frenzy hybrid
builds.why: Its unique skill inflicts Madness buildup on enemies, fitting a Frenzied Flame-themed or Madness-status build.
